creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
I noticed two things:

1) Nothing in the pkg links to liblwgeom.so at compile-time. Is this dlopen()ed?
2) There is this:
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/www/tinyows/cgi-bin/tinyows is linked to /usr/local/lib/libpq.so.5 from databases/postgresql95-client but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USES+=pgsql
